title: oldenlandia hainanensis
intro: Oldenlandia hainanensis, also known as Hainanese oldenlandia or Chinese crested grass, is a perennial herb native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. Oldenlandia hainanensis is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in combination with other medicinal herbs in traditional Chinese medicine practices.
